objective: Close F-0094 by making the existing paper composer consume the stable paper_section and question_group command APIs: provide draft-only section create, rename, reorder and empty-delete controls; expose question_group identity, rename, reorder, empty-delete and system subtotal; and move a question between a compatible material group or standalone section without public-id entry controls. Preserve published/archived read-only behavior and do not change backend, schema, permissions or learner snapshots.
blockedFiles: schema, migration or persistent database access
backend route, service, repository or contract changes
question, material or scoring snapshot rewrite
learner snapshot or another independent finding
Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApiCaller: AdminPaperComposerPage already owns the draft, revision, authenticated fetch boundary and question edit lifecycle. The UI follow-up can consume the two collection command routes without another product layer.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routeServiceRepositorySchema: The b91f6e0 foundation already provides strict draft/revision/ownership commands, stable identities, exact-set reorder, empty-only delete and membership compatibility. This task does not alter that authority.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: AdminPaperComposerPage.test.tsx directly mocks all composer requests and is the focused interaction contract. admin-paper-ui.test.ts is the static affected regression named by validation.
authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: Module 02 and F-0094 require independently maintainable section names/descriptions/order, manageable material groups with child subtotal, membership moves and empty-container publication rejection.
authoritativeChainEvidence.scopeDecision: Group creation in the UI is limited to an existing standalone material snapshot already in the paper; this avoids public-id entry and cannot introduce a material outside the paper. Existing add-by-material remains the entry for a new material and question.

validationEvidence.tddRed: 2 expected failures for missing section and group management interactions
validationEvidence.focusedAndAffectedRegression: 22/22 across AdminPaperComposerPage interaction and admin paper UI static regression
validationEvidence.lint: pass changed composer and interaction test
validationEvidence.build: pass Next build with 100 static pages
validationEvidence.formatAndDiff: pass targeted Prettier and git diff check
validationEvidence.adversarialReview: pass stable identity, exact-set reorder, draft-only controls, empty-only deletion, material-compatible membership, orphan visibility, published read-only, no public-id entry and no backend/schema/permission/snapshot change

resumeAnchor.task: paper structure management UI final closure
resumeAnchor.condition: backend foundation b91f6e0 is closed and synced
